homepage.heroSubline: Wonderwoman Construction: Quality craftsmanship, reliable service. Transforming homes across the Twin Cities.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Driven by Results
aboutText: Wonderwoman Construction started with a simple goal: to deliver exceptional remodeling services with unmatched integrity. We saw a need for contractors who not only possessed the skills to transform spaces but also the commitment to treat every project as if it were their own home.

Our approach is rooted in clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering attention to detail. We believe in transparency throughout the entire process, ensuring you're informed and confident every step of the way. We prioritize quality materials and proven techniques to withstand Minnesota's harsh climate.

As a Minneapolis-based company, we're deeply invested in our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to create lasting relationships with our clients. We're not just building structures; we're building trust and enhancing the neighborhoods we call home.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Skilled professionals delivering superior quality and lasting results.

valueProps.title: Transparent Communication
valueProps.description: Open and honest communication throughout the entire remodeling process.

valueProps.title: Weather-Resistant Solutions
valueProps.description: Durable materials and techniques designed to withstand Minnesota's climate challenges.

valueProps.title: Timely Project Completion
valueProps.description: Efficient project management to minimize disruption and maximize satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Wonderwoman Construction today for a free consultation and let's bring your vision to life.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your home.
services.description:
Your kitchen is more than just a place to cook; it's a gathering spot, a place for memories, and often the focal point of your home. Wonderwoman Construction specializes in creating kitchens that are not only beautiful but also highly functional and tailored to your specific needs. Whether you're dreaming of a complete overhaul or a simple refresh, we're equipped to handle every aspect of your kitchen remodel, from design and layout to cabinet installation, countertop selection, and appliance upgrades.

We understand the unique challenges of remodeling older Minneapolis homes, particularly the Craftsman and Colonial styles. We're adept at working with existing layouts and architectural details to create seamless transitions and preserve the character of your home. We also prioritize durability and longevity, selecting materials that can withstand the demands of daily use and the extremes of Minnesota's climate. Our expertise extends to modern condos in downtown Minneapolis, where space optimization and sleek design are paramount.

From initial consultation to final walkthrough, we're committed to providing a stress-free and enjoyable remodeling experience. We'll work closely with you to understand your vision, budget, and timeline, ensuring that your new kitchen exceeds your expectations.

faq.question: How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?
faq.answer: The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project, but typically ranges from 6 to 12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do you handle all the necessary permits?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure your project complies with local regulations. We're familiar with Minneapolis' specific building codes.

faq.question: Can you work with my existing kitchen layout?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can work with your existing layout or create a completely new design, depending on your needs and preferences.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a spa-like retreat in your own home.
services.description:
Transform your outdated bathroom into a luxurious and functional space with Wonderwoman Construction. We specialize in bathroom remodeling projects of all sizes, from simple cosmetic updates to complete renovations. Whether you're looking to upgrade your fixtures, install a new shower or tub, or create a more accessible and comfortable space, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

We understand the challenges of remodeling bathrooms in older Minneapolis homes, including dealing with limited space, outdated plumbing, and moisture issues. We're skilled at maximizing space efficiency and incorporating modern amenities while preserving the character of your home. We also use high-quality, moisture-resistant materials to ensure the longevity of your bathroom remodel. We are experienced working in bungalows and two-story homes in Uptown and Southwest Minneapolis.

Our team will guide you through every step of the remodeling process, from design and material selection to installation and finishing touches. We'll work closely with you to understand your needs and preferences, ensuring that your new bathroom is both beautiful and functional.

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for a bathroom remodel?
faq.answer: Tile is a popular choice for bathroom flooring due to its water resistance, durability, and wide variety of styles. We can help you choose the perfect tile for your project.

faq.question: Can you install a walk-in shower?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install a walk-in shower as part of your bathroom remodel. We'll ensure it meets accessibility standards and your specific needs.

faq.question: How much does a bathroom remodel typically cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a bathroom remodel depends on the scope of the project and the materials you choose. We'll provide a detailed estimate after our initial consultation.

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.shortDescription: Unlock the hidden potential of your basement.
services.description:
Transform your unfinished basement into a valuable living space with Wonderwoman Construction. We specialize in basement finishing projects that add square footage, increase home value, and provide you with customized living areas. Whether you envision a family room, home office, entertainment space, or extra bedrooms, we can bring your ideas to life.

We understand the unique challenges of basement finishing in Minneapolis, including moisture control, insulation, and code compliance. We use proven techniques and high-quality materials to create a dry, comfortable, and energy-efficient basement that meets all local building codes. We have experience finishing basements in a variety of home styles, including ramblers in South Minneapolis and older homes in Northeast Minneapolis.

Our team will handle every aspect of the basement finishing process, from design and layout to framing, drywall, flooring, and electrical and plumbing work. We'll work closely with you to understand your needs and preferences, ensuring that your finished basement is a space you'll love for years to come.

faq.question: How do I prevent moisture problems in my finished basement?
faq.answer: We use a combination of moisture-resistant materials, proper insulation, and effective drainage systems to prevent moisture problems in finished basements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to finish my basement?
faq.answer: Yes, you typically need a permit to finish your basement in Minneapolis. We'll handle the permit application process for you.

faq.question: What is the best type of flooring for a basement?
faq.answer: Waterproof or water-resistant flooring options, such as luxury vinyl plank (LVP) or epoxy, are ideal for basements.

services.name: Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your home with a durable, reliable roof.
services.description:
Wonderwoman Construction offers comprehensive roofing services to protect your home from the elements. From roof repairs and replacements to new roof installations, we have the expertise to handle all your roofing needs. We understand the importance of a solid roof in Minnesota's harsh climate, where heavy snow, ice dams, and extreme temperature fluctuations can take a toll on your roof's integrity.

We work with a variety of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and flat roofing systems. We'll help you choose the best roofing option for your home's style and budget. Our team is skilled at identifying and repairing roof leaks, replacing damaged shingles, and addressing ice dam issues. We're familiar with the roofing challenges specific to Minneapolis homes, from the steep-pitched roofs of Victorian-era homes to the flat roofs of modern condos.

We're committed to providing high-quality workmanship and using durable materials to ensure the longevity of your roof. We also offer emergency roofing services to address urgent repairs and prevent further damage to your home.

faq.question: How do I know if my roof needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your roof may need to be replaced include missing or damaged shingles, leaks, and excessive granule loss. We can provide a thorough roof inspection to assess its condition.

faq.question: What is the best type of roofing material for Minnesota's climate?
faq.answer: Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective choice for Minnesota roofs. Metal roofing is also a durable and long-lasting option.

faq.question: How can I prevent ice dams on my roof?
faq.answer: Proper attic insulation and ventilation can help prevent ice dams. We can assess your attic and recommend solutions to improve its energy efficiency.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's curb appeal and protect it from the elements.
services.description:
Wonderwoman Construction specializes in siding installation and repair services that enhance your home's curb appeal and protect it from the elements. We offer a wide variety of siding options, including vinyl siding, fiber cement siding, and wood siding. We'll help you choose the best siding material for your home's style, budget, and maintenance preferences.

We understand the importance of durable siding in Minnesota's climate, where extreme temperatures, moisture, and freeze-thaw cycles can damage siding over time. We use high-quality materials and proven installation techniques to ensure that your new siding is weather-resistant and long-lasting. We're familiar with the siding styles common in Minneapolis neighborhoods, from the clapboard siding of older homes in Linden Hills to the vinyl siding of newer homes in the suburbs.

Our team will handle every aspect of the siding installation process, from removing your old siding to installing new flashing and trim. We'll work closely with you to ensure that your new siding is installed properly and looks great.

faq.question: What are the benefits of vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding is a cost-effective, low-maintenance, and durable siding option that comes in a wide variety of colors and styles.

faq.question: How long does siding typically last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of siding depends on the material and installation quality, but typically ranges from 20 to 50 years.

faq.question: Can you match my existing siding?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match your existing siding or help you choose a complementary siding style.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Improve your energy efficiency and enhance your home's aesthetics.
services.description:
Wonderwoman Construction offers professional window replacement services that improve your home's energy efficiency, enhance its aesthetics, and increase its value. We offer a wide variety of window styles and materials, including vinyl windows, wood windows, and fiberglass windows. We'll help you choose the best windows for your home's style, budget, and energy efficiency goals.

We understand the importance of energy-efficient windows in Minnesota's climate, where heating and cooling costs can be significant. We install high-quality windows with low-E coatings and insulated frames to minimize heat loss in the winter and heat gain in the summer. We're familiar with the window styles common in Minneapolis homes, from the double-hung windows of older homes to the casement windows of newer homes.

Our team will handle every aspect of the window replacement process, from removing your old windows to installing new flashing and trim. We'll work closely with you to ensure that your new windows are installed properly and look great.

faq.question: What are the benefits of energy-efficient windows?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows can save you money on your heating and cooling bills, reduce drafts, and improve your home's comfort.

faq.question: What is the best type of window for Minnesota's climate?
faq.answer: Vinyl windows with low-E coatings and insulated frames are a popular and energy-efficient choice for Minnesota homes.

faq.question: How long do windows typically last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of windows depends on the material and installation quality, but typically ranges from 15 to 30 years.

serviceAreas.content: Proudly serving Minneapolis and surrounding communities.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Wonderwoman Construction completely transformed our outdated kitchen into a modern, functional space. They listened to our needs and preferences and delivered a kitchen that exceeded our expectations. The team was professional, efficient, and kept us informed throughout the entire process. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We hired Wonderwoman Construction to finish our unfinished basement, and we're thrilled with the results. They created a comfortable and inviting family room that we now use all the time. The only minor issue was a slight delay in the project timeline, but they communicated proactively and made sure everything was completed to our satisfaction.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: After a severe storm, our roof was damaged, and we needed a quick and reliable roofing contractor. Wonderwoman Construction responded promptly and provided a thorough inspection and estimate. They replaced our roof efficiently and professionally, and we haven't had any issues since. Great service!

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: Wonderwoman Construction did an outstanding job remodeling our master bathroom. They helped us design a beautiful and functional space that feels like a spa. The craftsmanship was excellent, and the team was respectful of our home and schedule. We couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: Lisa P.
reviews.text: We chose Wonderwoman Construction to install new siding on our home, and we're very pleased with the results. The new siding looks great and has significantly improved our home's curb appeal. The installation team was professional and efficient, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done. A few minor communication hiccups, but overall, a positive experience.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: We replaced our old, drafty windows with energy-efficient windows from Wonderwoman Construction, and we've already noticed a difference in our heating bills. The new windows look great and have made our home much more comfortable. The installation was quick and professional, and the team was very knowledgeable and helpful.
